CVE-2019-20326.title: A heap-based buffer overflow in _cairo_image_surface_create_from_ ...
CVE-2019-20326.summary: A heap-based buffer overflow in _cairo_image_surface_create_from_jpeg() in extensions/cairo_io/cairo-image-surface-jpeg.c in GNOME gThumb before 3.8.3 and Linux Mint Pix before 2.4.5 allows attackers to cause a crash and potentially execute arbitrary code via a crafted JPEG file.

CVE-2020-36427.title: GNOME gThumb before 3.10.1 allows an application crash via a malf ...
CVE-2020-36427.summary: GNOME gThumb before 3.10.1 allows an application crash via a malformed JPEG image.
